case_title: IN RE: SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENTS RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT MARTA JR., PHILLIP CHARLES

NOTICE OF PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ORDER APPROVING PETITION FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS [CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10139.5 ET SEQ]
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
